TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Korea,_north, title = Korea,_north, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Korea,_north} }

S.FORM: Korea, north Itini i 40 00 N, 127 00 E, noAsiya ko Korea, north. Polong no sekalay i 120,538 sq km "saka 99 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 120,408 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 130 sq km " Polong i 25,115,311 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 21.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 46%, malo no roma to a sera 32.20%. siyoto O (((Pyongyang)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 15 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Kim Jong-un , patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ko~ur…ôa, no~urtńß itini i ** ** n, *** ** …ô, no~uasija ko~u ko~ur…ôa, no~urtńß. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((pjo~uŇčjaŇč)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakafa…ĺo~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i kim *o~uŇč-o~u~un , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Korea, north Itini i 40 00 N, 127 00 E, noAsiya ko Korea, north. Polong no sekalay i 120,538 sq km "saka 99 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 120,408 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 130 sq km " Polong i 25,115,311 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 21.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 46%, malo no roma to a sera 32.20%. siyoto O (((Pyongyang)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 15 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Kim Jong-un , patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((pjo~uŇčjaŇč)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakafa…ĺo~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i kim *o~uŇč-o~u~un , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
